caption: A presentation slide titled "Stream Processor" is displayed, featuring a diagram on the left and a bulleted list on the right. The diagram consists of a rounded rectangular container housing a smaller teal box labeled "Stream Processor" with a red arrow pointing down to a red box labeled "Real Time Analysis." The accompanying text describes the processor's capabilities: "Receive structured events (records)," "Expose a Query Language" (with sub-points for "Keys selection," "Filtering," "Aggregation Functions," and "Events Routing"), and "Do processing in-memory." In the top right corner of the screen, a small video inset shows a person with long dark hair wearing a light-colored garment. Across the sequence of frames, the content of the slide and the person in the inset remain static, with no visible movement or changes in the visual information.
